verses.3: Inna anzalnahu fee laylatin mubarakatin inna kunna munthireena
verses.5: Amran min AAindina inna kunna mursileena
verses.6: Rahmatan min rabbika innahu huwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu
verses.7: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena
verses.8: La ilaha illa huwa yuhyee wayumeetu rabbukum warabbu abaikumu alawwaleena
verses.10: Fairtaqib yawma tatee alssamao bidukhanin mubeenin
verses.12: Rabbana ikshif AAanna alAAathaba inna muminoona
verses.13: Anna lahumu alththikra waqad jaahum rasoolun mubeenun
verses.14: Thumma tawallaw AAanhu waqaloo muAAallamun majnoonun
verses.15: Inna kashifoo alAAathabi qaleelan innakum AAaidoona
verses.16: Yawma nabtishu albatshata alkubra inna muntaqimoona
verses.17: Walaqad fatanna qablahum qawma firAAawna wajaahum rasoolun kareemun
verses.18: An addoo ilayya AAibada Allahi innee lakum rasoolun ameenun
verses.19: Waan la taAAloo AAala Allahi innee ateekum bisultanin mubeenin
verses.20: Wainnee AAuthtu birabbee warabbikum an tarjumooni
verses.22: FadaAAa rabbahu anna haolai qawmun mujrimoona
verses.24: Waotruki albahra rahwan innahum jundun mughraqoona
verses.29: Fama bakat AAalayhimu alssamao waalardu wama kanoo munthareena
verses.30: Walaqad najjayna banee israeela mina alAAathabi almuheeni
verses.31: Min firAAawna innahu kana AAaliyan mina almusrifeena
verses.32: Walaqadi ikhtarnahum AAala AAilmin AAala alAAalameena
verses.33: Waataynahum mina alayati ma feehi balaon mubeenun
verses.35: In hiya illa mawtatuna aloola wama nahnu bimunshareena
verses.37: Ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaAAin waallatheena min qablihim ahlaknahum innahum kanoo mujrimeena
verses.38: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena
verses.39: Ma khalaqnahuma illa bialhaqqi walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona
verses.41: Yawma la yughnee mawlan AAan mawlan shayan wala hum yunsaroona
verses.42: Illa man rahima Allahu innahu huwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu
verses.48: Thumma subboo fawqa rasihi min AAathabi alhameemi
verses.50: Inna hatha ma kuntum bihi tamtaroona
verses.56: La yathooqoona feeha almawta illa almawtata aloola wawaqahum AAathaba aljaheemi
verses.57: Fadlan min rabbika thalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu
